entry_criteria.description: CP6 implementation evidence exists and passed.
Verification environment is local and does not require runtime authorization.

checklist.description: Verification object inventory covers code, guardrail, tests and process evidence.
Trace matrix covers UC-58, UC-59 and UC-60.
Design contract checks pass for metadata-only scope, ordered chain and zero operation counters.
Automated checks pass: pytest, py_compile, git diff --check, JSON validation, workspace check and CR tracking.

exit_criteria.description: CR150 local metadata linkage is verified and can proceed to release readiness.
No authorization boundary was expanded during verification.

remaining_risks.next_action: Keep runtime/data/external execution deferred to separate explicit CR.
Use meta-qa if user explicitly requests sub-agent verification.
